summary: Testing 3-tier Document Viewer system (Tier 1 open, Tier 2 PIN-protected, Tier 3 terminal-only). All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly.

test_cases.detail: GET /api/doc/view/{code} returns basic info without auth
Valid PIN returns full document with attached_files
Items have name, qty, price, total fields
DocViewerPage loads with items, total, status immediately
Tier 2 locked section with expand button works
Clicking View Full Details expands PIN input form
PIN 521325 shows full details with 'Full details unlocked'
Terminal-only actions (Tier 3) NOT shown on regular browser

404_handling.detail: Nonexistent code shows 'Document Not Found' error with code displayed

verified_features: GET /api/doc/view/{code} returns basic document info without auth (Tier 1 open endpoint)
POST /api/doc/lookup with PIN returns full document details including payment history/attached files (Tier 2)
DocViewerPage at /doc/{code} loads instantly showing items, total, status (Tier 1)
DocViewerPage 'View Full Details' button expands PIN input
DocViewerPage valid PIN shows full details (Tier 2)
DocViewerPage invalid PIN shows error message 'Invalid PIN'
DocViewerPage does NOT show terminal action buttons on non-terminal devices (Tier 3 gating)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test doc code CT7SP66X
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-tier document viewer fully tested. Test code CT7SP66X is branch_transfer type (status: Cancelled). Tier 1 endpoint GET /api/doc/view/{code} requires NO auth. Tier 2 POST /api/doc/lookup requires PIN (521325). Tier 3 terminal detection checks localStorage for 'agrismart_terminal' key - regular browsers won't have this. UI design is clean and professional with proper error handling.
